message:
Bump to 0.2.0, update README with CI benchmark results

- Update all code examples to use direct imports (no init/vj. prefix)
- Update benchmark tables from CI run #22100649717:
  - AI SDK: 14× at 1KB → 2028× at 100KB (Anthropic SDK)
  - TTFA: 2.42s stock → 10.2ms VectorJSON at 100KB
  - Deep compare: 2× faster (ignore key order), 4× (strict)
- Add 5KB payload row to AI SDK table
- Update test count to 724+
- Bump version 0.1.0 → 0.2.0 for npm release

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "vectorjson",
-  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "version": "0.2.0",
   "description": "O(n) WASM SIMD JSON parser for AI agents — stream fields instantly, abort errors early, offload parsing to Workers",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
